data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh` using assert.sh library. Tests validate the red-test-writer agent definition structure and content.

Test functions (10 total):
1. `test_frontmatter_has_name_red_test_writer` — validates YAML frontmatter name field
2. `test_frontmatter_has_model_sonnet` — validates YAML frontmatter model=sonnet
3. `test_has_rejection_criteria_rubric` — validates Rejection Criteria Rubric section exists
4. `test_rejection_criteria_prohibits_grep_source` — asserts agent file prohibits grepping source files (DD2)
5. `test_has_output_contract_section` — validates Output Contract section exists
6. `test_output_contract_defines_written_format` — validates TEST_RESULT:written format
7. `test_output_contract_defines_rejected_format` — validates TEST_RESULT:rejected format
8. `test_output_contract_written_fields` — asserts TEST_FILE, RED_ASSERTION, BEHAVIORAL_JUSTIFICATION named
9. `test_output_contract_rejected_fields` — asserts REJECTION_REASON, DESCRIPTION, SUGGESTED_ALTERNATIVE named
10. `test_rejection_reason_enum_defined` — validates all 4 rejection reasons listed

IMPORTANT: The test must NOT have an early-exit guard (exit 0) when the agent file is absent. It must exit non-zero when the file doesn't exist (RED phase).

Also add .test-index entry: `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md: tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh`

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add entry)

## TDD Requirement
This IS the RED test task. Tests must fail (exit non-zero) before Task 3 creates the agent file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 10 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero pre-implementation (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry exists for red-test-writer
  Verify: grep -q 'red-test-writer.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
